justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent accurately interpreted all temporal preferences, including the initial complex request and subsequent adjustments.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered relevant alternative appointments, avoiding previously rejected times and providing a good range of options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed information and responded without any unnecessary turns or redundant queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, leading to a successful booking without any friction points.
